001/*

003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3.ui;
018
019import static java.util.Collections.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.bean.html5.HtmlBuilder.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.bean.html5.HtmlBuilder.a;
022import static org.apache.juneau.bean.html5.HtmlBuilder.tr;
023import static org.apache.juneau.commons.http.MediaType.*;
024import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
025import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.list;
026import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
027import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
028
029import java.util.*;
030
031import org.apache.juneau.bean.html5.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.MediaType;
034import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.commons.logging.Logger;
036import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
037import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
038import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
039import org.apache.juneau.marshall.cp.*;
040import org.apache.juneau.marshall.html.*;
041import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
042
043/**
044 * Generates an OpenAPI-UI interface from an OpenAPI document.
045 *
046 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
047 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanOpenApi3">juneau-bean-openapi-v3</a>
048 * </ul>
049 */
050@SuppressWarnings({
051   "java:S1192",      // String literals repeated for clarity in UI generation
052   "javabugs:S2259"   // Null accesses are guarded by nn() checks; Sonar's flow analysis does not track nn() as a null guard
053})
054public class OpenApiUI extends ObjectSwap<OpenApi,Div> {
055
056   private static class Session {
057      final int resolveRefsMaxDepth;
058      final OpenApi openApi;
059
060      Session(OpenApi openApi) {
061         this.openApi = openApi.copy();
062         this.resolveRefsMaxDepth = 1;
063      }
064   }
065
066   // @formatter:off
067   static final FileFinder RESOURCES = FileFinder
068      .create(BasicBeanStore.INSTANCE)
069      .cp(OpenApiUI.class, null, true)
070      .dir(",")
071      .caching(Boolean.getBoolean("RestContext.disableClasspathResourceCaching.b") ? -1 : 1_000_000) // HTT - system property branch only triggers when property is set
072      .build();
073   // @formatter:on
074
075   private static final Set<String> STANDARD_METHODS = set("get", "put", "post", "delete", "options", "head", "patch", "trace");
076
077   private static final Logger LOG = Logger.getLogger(OpenApiUI.class);
078
079   @SuppressWarnings({
080      "null" // Null analysis not applicable for optional values
081   })
082   private static void addOperationIfTagMatches(Div tagBlockContents, Session s, String path, String method, Operation op, Tag t) {
083      if ((t == null && (op.getTags() == null || op.getTags().isEmpty())) || (nn(t) && nn(op.getTags()) && op.getTags().contains(t.getName()))) { // HTT - op.getTags() is always non-null (initialized to list()); the null branch is unreachable
084         tagBlockContents.child(opBlock(s, path, method, op));
085      }
086   }
087
088   private static Div examples(Session s, Parameter pi) {
089      var m = new JsonMap();
090
091      try {
092         var si = pi.getSchema();
093         if (nn(si))
094            m.put("model", si.copy().resolveRefs(s.openApi, new ArrayDeque<>(), s.resolveRefsMaxDepth));
095      } catch (Exception e) { // HTT - requires resolveRefs to throw during schema resolution
096         LOG.warning(e, "Could not resolve schema references while rendering examples."); // HTT
097      }
098
099      if (m.isEmpty())
100         return null;
101
102      return examplesDiv(m);
103   }
104
105   private static Div examples(Session s, Response ri) {
106      var m = new JsonMap();
107      try {
108         var content = ri.getContent();
109         if (nn(content)) {
110            // For OpenAPI 3.0, content is a map of media types to MediaType objects
111            content.forEach((mediaType, mediaTypeObj) -> {
112               if (nn(mediaTypeObj.getSchema())) {
113               try {
114                  var schema = mediaTypeObj.getSchema().copy().resolveRefs(s.openApi, new ArrayDeque<>(), s.resolveRefsMaxDepth);
115                  m.put(mediaType, schema);
116               } catch (Exception e) { // HTT - requires resolveRefs to throw
117                  LOG.warning(e, "Could not resolve schema references while rendering examples."); // HTT
118               }
119            }
120         });
121      }
122   } catch (Exception e) { // HTT - requires content.forEach to throw
123      LOG.warning(e, "Could not resolve schema references while rendering examples."); // HTT
124   }
125
126      if (m.isEmpty())
127         return null;
128
129      return examplesDiv(m);
130   }
131
132   @SuppressWarnings({
133      "null" // Null analysis not applicable for optional values
134   })
135   private static Div examplesDiv(JsonMap m) {
136      if (m.isEmpty()) // HTT - callers always check !m.isEmpty() before calling examplesDiv
137         return null;
138
139      Select select = null;
140      if (m.size() > 1) {
141         select = select().onchange("selectExample(this)").class_("example-select");
142      }
143
144      var div = div(select).class_("examples");
145
146      if (nn(select))
147         select.child(option("model", "model"));
148      var modelContent = m.remove("model");
149      div.child(div(nn(modelContent) ? modelContent : "").class_("model active").attr("data-name", "model"));
150
151      var select2 = select;
152      m.forEach((k, v) -> {
153         if (nn(select2))
154            select2.child(option(k, k));
155         div.child(div(v.toString().replace("\\n", "\n")).class_("example").attr("data-name", k));
156      });
157
158      return div;
159   }
160
161   // Creates the informational summary before the ops.
162   @SuppressWarnings({
163      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this logic
164   })
165   private static Table header(Session s) {
166      var table = table().class_("header");
167
168      var info = s.openApi.getInfo();
169      if (nn(info)) {
170
171         if (nn(info.getDescription()))
172            table.child(tr(th("Description:"), td(toBRL(info.getDescription()))));
173
174         if (nn(info.getVersion()))
175            table.child(tr(th("Version:"), td(info.getVersion())));
176
177         var c = info.getContact();
178         if (nn(c)) {
179            var t2 = table();
180
181            if (nn(c.getName()))
182               t2.child(tr(th("Name:"), td(c.getName())));
183            if (nn(c.getUrl()))
184               t2.child(tr(th("URL:"), td(a(c.getUrl(), c.getUrl()))));
185            if (nn(c.getEmail()))
186               t2.child(tr(th("Email:"), td(a("mailto:" + c.getEmail(), c.getEmail()))));
187
188            table.child(tr(th("Contact:"), td(t2)));
189         }
190
191         var l = info.getLicense();
192         if (nn(l)) {
193            var content = nn(l.getName()) ? l.getName() : l.getUrl();
194            var child = nn(l.getUrl()) ? a(l.getUrl(), content) : l.getName();
195            table.child(tr(th("License:"), td(child)));
196         }
197
198         ExternalDocumentation ed = s.openApi.getExternalDocs();
199         if (nn(ed)) {
200            var content = nn(ed.getDescription()) ? ed.getDescription() : ed.getUrl();
201            var child = nn(ed.getUrl()) ? a(ed.getUrl(), content) : ed.getDescription();
202            table.child(tr(th("Docs:"), td(child)));
203         }
204
205         if (nn(info.getTermsOfService())) {
206            var tos = info.getTermsOfService();
207            var child = isUri(tos) ? a(tos, tos) : tos;
208            table.child(tr(th("Terms of Service:"), td(child)));
209         }
210      }
211
212      return table;
213   }
214
215   private static Div headers(Response ri) {
216      if (ri.getHeaders() == null)
217         return null;
218
219      var sectionTable = table(tr(th("Name"), th("Description"), th("Schema"))).class_("section-table");
220
221      var headers = div(div("Headers:").class_("section-name"), sectionTable).class_("headers");
222
223      ri.getHeaders()
224         .forEach((k, v) -> sectionTable.child(tr(td(k).class_("name"), td(toBRL(v.getDescription())).class_("description"), td(v.asMap().keepAll("type", "format", "items", "collectionFormat",
225            "default", "maximum", "exclusiveMaximum", "minimum", "exclusiveMinimum", "maxLength", "minLength", "pattern", "maxItems", "minItems", "uniqueItems", "enum", "multipleOf")))));
226
227      return headers;
228   }
229
230   private static Div modelBlock(String modelName, SchemaInfo model) {
231      return div().class_("op-block op-block-closed model").children(modelBlockSummary(modelName, model), div(model).class_("op-block-contents"));
232   }
233
234   private static HtmlElement modelBlockSummary(String modelName, SchemaInfo model) {
235      return div().class_("op-block-summary").onclick("toggleOpBlock(this)").children(span(modelName).class_("method-button"),
236         nn(model.getDescription()) ? span(toBRL(model.getDescription())).class_("summary") : null);
237   }
238
239   // Creates the contents under the "Model" header.
240   private static Div modelsBlockContents(Session s) {
241      var modelBlockContents = div().class_("tag-block-contents");
242      if (nn(s.openApi.getComponents()) && nn(s.openApi.getComponents().getSchemas())) { // HTT - always true when called from swap() which guards with same condition; both false-branches are unreachable
243         s.openApi.getComponents().getSchemas().forEach((k, v) -> modelBlockContents.child(modelBlock(k, v)));
244      }
245      return modelBlockContents;
246   }
247
248   // Creates the "Model" header.
249   private static HtmlElement modelsBlockSummary() {
250      return div().class_("tag-block-summary").onclick("toggleTagBlock(this)").children(span("Models").class_("name"));
251   }
252
253   private static Div opBlock(Session s, String path, String opName, Operation op) {
254
255      boolean deprecated = isTrue(op.getDeprecated());
256      var opClass = deprecated ? "deprecated" : opName.toLowerCase();
257      if (! deprecated && ! STANDARD_METHODS.contains(opClass)) // HTT - opBlock only called with standard method names; custom method branch unreachable
258         opClass = "other";
259
260      return div().class_("op-block op-block-closed " + opClass).children(opBlockSummary(path, opName, op), div(tableContainer(s, op)).class_("op-block-contents"));
261   }
262
263   private static HtmlElement opBlockSummary(String path, String opName, Operation op) {
264      return div().class_("op-block-summary").onclick("toggleOpBlock(this)").children(span(opName.toUpperCase()).class_("method-button"), span(path).class_("path"),
265         nn(op.getSummary()) ? span(op.getSummary()).class_("summary") : null);
266   }
267
268   private static Div tableContainer(Session s, Operation op) {
269      var tableContainer = div().class_("table-container");
270
271      if (nn(op.getDescription()))
272         tableContainer.child(div(toBRL(op.getDescription())).class_("op-block-description"));
273
274      if (nn(op.getParameters())) {
275         tableContainer.child(div(h4("Parameters").class_("title")).class_("op-block-section-header"));
276
277         var parameters = table(tr(th("Name").class_("parameter-key"), th("Description").class_("parameter-key"))).class_("parameters");
278
279         op.getParameters().forEach(x -> {
280            var piName = x.getName();
281            var required = nn(x.getRequired()) && x.getRequired(); // HTT - JaCoCo counts Boolean unboxing NPE check as a branch; unreachable since nn() already guarantees non-null
282
283            var parameterKey = td(div(piName).class_("name" + (required ? " required" : "")), required ? div("required").class_("requiredlabel") : null,
284               nn(x.getSchema()) ? div(x.getSchema().getType()).class_("type") : null, div('(' + x.getIn() + ')').class_("in")).class_("parameter-key");
285
286            var parameterValue = td(div(toBRL(x.getDescription())).class_("description"), examples(s, x)).class_("parameter-value");
287
288            parameters.child(tr(parameterKey, parameterValue));
289         });
290
291         tableContainer.child(parameters);
292      }
293
294      if (nn(op.getResponses())) {
295         tableContainer.child(div(h4("Responses").class_("title")).class_("op-block-section-header"));
296
297         var responses = table(tr(th("Code").class_("response-key"), th("Description").class_("response-key"))).class_("responses");
298         tableContainer.child(responses);
299
300         op.getResponses().forEach((k, v) -> {
301            var code = td(k).class_("response-key");
302
303            var codeValue = td(div(toBRL(v.getDescription())).class_("description"), examples(s, v), headers(v)).class_("response-value");
304
305            responses.child(tr(code, codeValue));
306         });
307      }
308
309      return tableContainer;
310   }
311
312   // Creates the contents under the "pet  Everything about your Pets  ext-link" header.
313   @SuppressWarnings({
314      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this logic
315   })
316   private static Div tagBlockContents(Session s, Tag t) {
317      var tagBlockContents = div().class_("tag-block-contents");
318
319      if (nn(s.openApi.getPaths())) {
320         s.openApi.getPaths().forEach((path, pathItem) -> {
321            // Check each HTTP method in the path item
322            if (nn(pathItem.getGet()))
323               addOperationIfTagMatches(tagBlockContents, s, path, "get", pathItem.getGet(), t);
324            if (nn(pathItem.getPut()))
325               addOperationIfTagMatches(tagBlockContents, s, path, "put", pathItem.getPut(), t);
326            if (nn(pathItem.getPost()))
327               addOperationIfTagMatches(tagBlockContents, s, path, "post", pathItem.getPost(), t);
328            if (nn(pathItem.getDelete()))
329               addOperationIfTagMatches(tagBlockContents, s, path, "delete", pathItem.getDelete(), t);
330            if (nn(pathItem.getOptions()))
331               addOperationIfTagMatches(tagBlockContents, s, path, "options", pathItem.getOptions(), t);
332            if (nn(pathItem.getHead()))
333               addOperationIfTagMatches(tagBlockContents, s, path, "head", pathItem.getHead(), t);
334            if (nn(pathItem.getPatch()))
335               addOperationIfTagMatches(tagBlockContents, s, path, "patch", pathItem.getPatch(), t);
336            if (nn(pathItem.getTrace()))
337               addOperationIfTagMatches(tagBlockContents, s, path, "trace", pathItem.getTrace(), t);
338         });
339      }
340
341      return tagBlockContents;
342   }
343
344   // Creates the "pet  Everything about your Pets  ext-link" header.
345   private static HtmlElement tagBlockSummary(Tag t) {
346      var ed = t.getExternalDocs();
347
348      String content;
349      if (nn(ed) && nn(ed.getDescription())) {
350         content = ed.getDescription();
351      } else if (nn(ed)) {
352         content = ed.getUrl().toString();
353      } else {
354         content = null;
355      }
356      return div().class_("tag-block-summary").onclick("toggleTagBlock(this)").children(span(t.getName()).class_("name"), span(toBRL(t.getDescription())).class_("description"),
357         nn(ed) && nn(ed.getUrl()) ? span(a(ed.getUrl(), content)).class_("extdocs") : null);
358   }
359
360   /**
361    * Replaces newlines with <br> elements.
362    */
363   private static List<Object> toBRL(String s) {
364      if (s == null)
365         return emptyList();
366      if (s.indexOf(',') == -1)
367         return singletonList(s);
368      var l = list();
369      var sa = s.split("\n");
370      for (var i = 0; i < sa.length; i++) {
371         if (i > 0)
372            l.add(br());
373         l.add(sa[i]);
374      }
375      return l;
376   }
377
378   /**
379    * This UI applies to HTML requests only.
380    */
381   @Override
382   public MediaType[] forMediaTypes() {
383      return CollectionUtils.a(HTML);
384   }
385
386   @Override
387   public Div swap(MarshallingSession marshallingSession, OpenApi openApi) throws Exception {
388
389      var s = new Session(openApi);
390
391      var css = RESOURCES.getString("files/htdocs/styles/OpenApiUI.css", null).orElse(null);
392      if (css == null) // HTT - primary CSS file path succeeds in normal test environments
393         css = RESOURCES.getString("OpenApiUI.css", null).orElse(null);
394
395      // Stamp the per-response Content-Security-Policy nonce onto the inline <style>/<script> when present so the UI
396      // satisfies a nonce-based CSP (the same nonce the REST layer emits in the Content-Security-Policy header).
397      var nonce = (marshallingSession instanceof HtmlDocSerializerSession marshallingSession2) ? marshallingSession2.getNonce() : null;
398
399      var style = style(css);
400      var script = script("text/javascript", RESOURCES.getString("OpenApiUI.js", null).orElse(null));
401      if (nonce != null) {
402         style.attr("nonce", nonce);
403         script.attr("nonce", nonce);
404      }
405
406      var outer = div(style, script, header(s)).class_("openapi-ui");
407
408      // Operations without tags are rendered first.
409      outer.child(div().class_("tag-block tag-block-open").children(tagBlockContents(s, null)));
410
411      if (nn(s.openApi.getTags())) {
412         s.openApi.getTags().forEach(x -> {
413            var tagBlock = div().class_("tag-block tag-block-open").children(tagBlockSummary(x), tagBlockContents(s, x));
414            outer.child(tagBlock);
415         });
416      }
417
418      if (nn(s.openApi.getComponents()) && nn(s.openApi.getComponents().getSchemas())) {
419         var modelBlock = div().class_("tag-block").children(modelsBlockSummary(), modelsBlockContents(s));
420         outer.child(modelBlock);
421      }
422
423      return outer;
424   }
425}
